faqs.question: How much does flea treatment cost in Bayonne, NJ?
faqs.answer: Flea treatment in Bayonne typically ranges from $350 to $650, depending on the size of your property, severity of the infestation, and number of treatments required. We provide free inspections and upfront pricing with no hidden fees, and can often offer same-day service for urgent flea problems.

faqs.question: How long does flea treatment take to work in Bayonne homes?
faqs.answer: Most Bayonne customers notice a significant reduction in flea activity within 24-48 hours of treatment. Complete elimination typically takes 2-3 weeks as our treatment targets fleas in all life stages (eggs, larvae, pupae, and adults). We include follow-up visits to ensure complete eradication and prevent re-infestation.

faqs.question: Is flea treatment safe for my pets and children in Bayonne?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use EPA-approved flea treatment products that are safe for pets and children when applied by our licensed professionals. We recommend keeping pets and children away from treated areas for 2-4 hours until surfaces dry completely. Our technicians will provide specific safety instructions tailored to your Bayonne home and family needs.
